name: service install — windows_task_scheduler_install.bat structure: Register-ScheduledTask + restart-on-failure + LogonType S4U
description: Dry-run file inspection. Verifies windows_task_scheduler_install.bat uses PowerShell Register-ScheduledTask, configures restart-on-failure (-RestartCount, -RestartInterval), uses -LogonType S4U (no stored password), checks Node-in-PATH, and is idempotent (schtasks /delete before creating). No shell execution.
